name: MK: Door-to-Door Sovereignty Tour
objective: Engage households on the vision of parliamentary sovereignty.
mainMessage: MK: Power back to the people. We are checking in to discuss the return of traditional leadership and people's rule.
talkingPoints: Sovereignty: Restoring power to parliament and traditional Kings.
Economy: Nationalizing strategic sectors for the benefit of the poor.
Social: Doubling child support grants to fight poverty.

questions.prompt: Do you support doubling the child support grant?

name: MK: Village People's Assembly
objective: Mobilize rural communities and traditional headmen.
mainMessage: MK: Uniting our villages for a sovereign future.
talkingPoints: Traditional: Empowering local headmen to resolve community disputes.
Land: Securing communal land rights for all families.

name: MK: eThekwini Mega-Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming branch launches and regalia distribution.
mainMessage: MK: Join the Revolution! Durban Central branch launch tomorrow at 10 AM. Defend your future!

name: MK: Sovereignty and People's Power Rally
objective: Promote the vision of parliamentary sovereignty and constitutional overhaul.
mainMessage: Uniting for Sovereignty: Returning power to the people through traditional leadership and parliamentary rule.
talkingPoints: Parliamentary Sovereignty: Courts should not override the will of the people.
Nationalization: Strategic sectors must be under state control.
